parameters.query:
INSERT INTO content_generation (
  job_id,
  status,
  brand_id,
  brand_name,
  product_id,
  product_name,
  topic_id,
  topic_title,
  language,
  platform,
  output_format,
  objective,
  additional_direction,
  reference_images,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}',
  'IN_PROGRESS',
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + (($("Normalize Request").first().json.brand || {}).id || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + (($("Normalize Request").first().json.brand || {}).name || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + (($("Normalize Request").first().json.product || {}).id || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + (($("Normalize Request").first().json.product || {}).name || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + (($("Normalize Request").first().json.topic || {}).id || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + (($("Normalize Request").first().json.topic || {}).title || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + ($("Normalize Request").first().json.language || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + ($("Normalize Request").first().json.platform || ($("Normalize Request").first().json.topic || {}).platform || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + ($("Normalize Request").first().json.outputFormat || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + ($("Normalize Request").first().json.objective || ($("Normalize Request").first().json.topic || {}).objective || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ (("" + ($("Normalize Request").first().json.additionalDirection || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', ''),
  '{{ JSON.stringify($("Normalize Request").first().json.referenceImages || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  now(),
  now()
)
RETURNING *;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF('{{ (("" + ((($("Normalize Request").first().json.brand || {}).id) || $json.brand_id || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', '')::text AS brand_id,
    NULLIF('{{ (("" + ((($("Normalize Request").first().json.product || {}).id) || $json.product_id || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', '')::text AS product_id,
    NULLIF('{{ (("" + ((($("Normalize Request").first().json.topic || {}).id) || $json.topic_id || "")).replace(/'/g, "''")) }}', '')::text AS topic_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT to_jsonb(ba) FROM brand_analysis ba, input i WHERE i.brand_id IS NOT NULL AND (ba.job_id = i.brand_id OR ba.id::text = i.brand_id) ORDER BY ba.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS brand_context,
  (SELECT to_jsonb(bp) FROM brand_product bp, input i WHERE i.product_id IS NOT NULL AND (bp.job_id = i.product_id OR bp.id::text = i.product_id) ORDER BY bp.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS product_context,
  (SELECT to_jsonb(ct) FROM content_topics ct, input i WHERE i.topic_id IS NOT NULL AND (ct.id::text = i.topic_id OR ct.job_id = i.topic_id) ORDER BY ct.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS topic_context;

parameters.text:
=You are an expert social media content generator for FCE.

Create SINGLE IMAGE content only.

MARKETING SKILLS APPLIED:
{{ $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.skills_context || $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.skillsContext || $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.skills_context_text || "No skills context provided." }}

BRAND CONTEXT:
{{ $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.brand_context_text || $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.brandContextText || "No brand context provided." }}

PRODUCT CONTEXT:
{{ $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.product_context_text || $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.productContextText || "No product context provided." }}

TOPIC CONTEXT:
{{ $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.topic_context_text || $("Build Content Context + Skills Context").first().json.topicContextText || "No topic context provided." }}

PLATFORM:
{{ $json.topic?.platform || $json.platform || "Instagram" }}

OBJECTIVE:
{{ $json.topic?.objective || $json.objective || "Awareness" }}

ADDITIONAL DIRECTION:
{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.additionalDirection || $("Normalize Request").first().json.topic?.additionalDirection || $json.additionalDirection || "No additional direction provided." }}

Reference image guidance:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.referenceImageAnalysis || {}) }}

CRITICAL:
- Return ONLY valid JSON.
- No markdown.
- Use the requested language.
- Be specific to the brand, product, and topic.
- Do not invent facts, claims, features, prices, testimonials, awards, or proof absent from context.
- imagePrompt is required and must describe the final image to generate.
- Please use this language for your output
LANGUAGE:
{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.language || $json.language || "Use the same language as the request" }}

Required JSON:
{
  "title": "",
  "platform": "",
  "objective": "",
  "format": "single_image",
  "caption": "",
  "hook": "",
  "cta": "",
  "hashtags": [],
  "visualDirection": "",
  "imagePrompt": ""
}

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS content_generation (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  job_id text UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IN_PROGRESS',
  brand_id text,
  brand_name text,
  product_id text,
  product_name text,
  topic_id text,
  topic_title text,
  language text,
  platform text,
  output_format text,
  objective text,
  additional_direction text,
  reference_images jsonb,
  result jsonb,
  error_message text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
ALTER TABLE content_generation ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS result jsonb;
ALTER TABLE content_generation ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message text;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS content_generation_job_id_unique_idx ON content_generation (job_id);

SELECT
  id,
  job_id,
  status,
  result,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM content_generation
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Status Request").first().json.jobId }}'
LIMIT 1;

Use the reference image analysis only as visual guidance for style, composition, color, mood, layout, and design direction. Do not copy exact text, logos, or protected design elements unless explicitly provided as owned brand assets.

CRITICAL:
- Return ONLY valid JSON.
- No markdown.
- Use the requested language.

- Each imagePrompt must be visually distinct but consistent with the same campaign style.
- Please use this language for your output

{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.language || $json.language || "Use the same language as the request" }}

}

parameters.query:
WITH update_run AS (
  UPDATE content_generation
  SET
    caption = NULLIF('{{ ($json.content?.caption || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
    hook = NULLIF('{{ ($json.content?.hook || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
    result = COALESCE(result, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
      'title', NULLIF('{{ ($json.content?.title || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'caption', NULLIF('{{ ($json.content?.caption || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'hook', NULLIF('{{ ($json.content?.hook || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'cta', NULLIF('{{ ($json.content?.cta || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'hashtags', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.content?.hashtags || []) }}'::jsonb
    ),
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
  RETURNING job_id
),
delete_images AS (
  DELETE FROM content_generation_images
  WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  true AS success,
  (SELECT job_id FROM update_run) AS job_id,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_images) AS deleted_images;

SELECT *
FROM content_generation_images
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
ORDER BY slide_number ASC, id ASC;

nodes.name: Fetch Generated Images by Job ID

parameters.query:
UPDATE content_generation
SET
  result = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data || $json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
RETURNING *;

UPDATE content_generation
SET
  status = 'DONE',
  updated_at = now()
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO content_generation_images (
  job_id,
  slide_number,
  type,
  headline,
  body,
  visual_direction,
  image_prompt,
  image_url,
  reference_image_url,
  aspect_ratio
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}',
  1,
  'single_image',
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Single Image Asset").first().json.headline || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Single Image Asset").first().json.body || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Single Image Asset").first().json.visualDirection || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Single Image Asset").first().json.imagePrompt || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Code in JavaScript3").item.json.uploadResult.imageUrl || $("Code in JavaScript3").item.json.imageUrl || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Single Image Asset").first().json.images?.[0]?.referenceImageUrl || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Single Image Asset").first().json.aspectRatio || "1:1").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO content_generation_images (
  job_id,
  slide_number,
  type,
  headline,
  body,
  visual_direction,
  image_prompt,
  image_url,
  reference_image_url,
  aspect_ratio
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}',
  1,
  'single_image',
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Story Image Asset").first().json.headline || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Story Image Asset").first().json.body || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Story Image Asset").first().json.visualDirection || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Story Image Asset").first().json.imagePrompt || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Code in JavaScript5").item.json.uploadResult.imageUrl || $("Code in JavaScript3").item.json.imageUrl || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Story Image Asset").first().json.referenceImageUrl || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Story Image Asset").first().json.aspectRatio || "1:1").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO content_generation_images (
  job_id,
  slide_number,
  type,
  headline,
  body,
  visual_direction,
  image_prompt,
  image_url,
  reference_image_url,
  aspect_ratio
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}',
  {{ Number($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.sceneNumber || $("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.slideNumber || $("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.index || 1) }},
  'reels_scene',
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.headline || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.body || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.visualDirection || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.imagePrompt || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Code in JavaScript6").item.json.uploadResult?.imageUrl || $("Code in JavaScript6").item.json.imageUrl || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.referenceImageUrl || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ ($("Prepare Reels Scene Images").item.json.aspectRatio || "9:16").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO content_generation_images (
  job_id,
  slide_number,
  type,
  headline,
  body,
  visual_direction,
  image_prompt,
  image_url,
  reference_image_url,
  aspect_ratio
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}',
  {{ $("Prepare Story Video Scene Images").item.json.sceneNumber || $("Prepare Story Video Scene Images").item.json.slideNumber || $("Prepare Story Video Scene Images").item.json.index || 1 }},

nodes.name: Wait Before Next Story Video Scene

parameters.query:
WITH update_run AS (
  UPDATE content_generation
  SET
    caption = NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.caption || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
    hook = NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.hook || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
    result = COALESCE(result, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
      'title', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.title || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'caption', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.caption || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'hook', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.hook || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'cta', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.cta || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'hashtags', '{{ JSON.stringify($("Parse Carousel Output").first().json.content?.hashtags || []) }}'::jsonb
    ),
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
  RETURNING job_id
),
delete_images AS (
  DELETE FROM content_generation_images
  WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  true AS success,
  (SELECT job_id FROM update_run) AS job_id,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_images) AS deleted_images;

WITH update_run AS (
  UPDATE content_generation
  SET
    caption = NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.caption || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
    hook = NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.hook || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
    result = COALESCE(result, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
      'title', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.title || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'caption', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.caption || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'hook', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.hook || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'cta', NULLIF('{{ ($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.cta || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
      'hashtags', '{{ JSON.stringify($("Parse Story Image Output").first().json.content?.hashtags || []) }}'::jsonb
    ),
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
  RETURNING job_id
),
delete_images AS (
  DELETE FROM content_generation_images
  WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").first().json.jobId }}'
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT true AS success, (SELECT job_id FROM update_run) AS job_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_images) AS deleted_images;

nodes.name: Upload Reels Scene Image to S3
Upload Story Video Scene Image to S3

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  job_id,
  slide_number,
  type,
  headline,
  body,
  visual_direction,
  image_prompt,
  image_url,
  reference_image_url,
  aspect_ratio,
  created_at
FROM content_generation_images
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Status Request").first().json.jobId }}'
ORDER BY slide_number ASC, id ASC;

SELECT
  id,
  job_id,
  status,
  caption,
  hook,
  result,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM content_generation
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Status Request").first().json.jobId }}'
LIMIT 1;
